title: The Ambient
description: A mod that simplifies the creation of custom maps, parkours, and replaces the playsound command with a more flexible one!
body:
This mod is created for creators of various maps or servers where atmosphere and ambient are needed. The mod allows you to easily integrate musical SFX events, and most importantly, do this even in survival mode. The mod kind of replaces playsound with a new extended analogue, with an interface and extended application! The mod also adds a screen shake generator, also customizable and flexible!

Features:
- Blocks work both from the interface and from the redstone signal
- Block recipes are available in survival
- The mod is compatible with any other mod
